headline: Does onsemi's New GaNEXUS Toolkit Subtly Reframe Its Long-Term Power Leadership Story (ON)?
summary: Earlier in June 2026, onsemi launched its GaNEXUS gallium nitride power portfolio and unveiled the cloud-based Elite Pairing Studio to simplify SiC MOSFET–gate driver selection for demanding applications such as AI data centers, electric vehicles, and industrial systems. Together, GaNEXUS and the Elite Pairing Studio expand onsemi’s advanced power toolkit, aiming to streamline customer design workflows and deepen its role in next-generation high-efficiency power architectures. We’ll now...
